channel.title: Posts on Joe Hutchinson
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Joe Hutchinson

item.title: Aether: A Clean Theme for Hugo
item.description: I will never understand why some websites make it so hard to view the content they contain. Pop-ups, banners, and ads are distracting enough on desktop and often completely ruin the mobile experience. I designed Aether to be free of all these distractions and simply highlight the content. The result feels more like a native application than a website. Interactions are intuitive, content is king, and distractions are omitted.
